candidate.objective: An accomplished earthworks operator with extensive experience across civil mining and construction environments, specialising in GPS-guided bulk and final trim earthworks, excavator and dozer operation, and civil infrastructure works. Adam has worked across major resource projects for clients including Rio Tinto, BHP, Fortescue, and Roy Hill, demonstrating broad plant competency and civil earthworks expertise.

duties: Operated excavators for general civil and mining earthworks activities.
Operated dozers for clearing, bulk earthworks, and final trim operations.
Utilised GPS machine control systems (IT) for precise final trim earthworks.
Operated loaders for general materials handling and earthworks support.
Performed bulk and final trim earthworks to survey specifications using GPS guidance.
Constructed and maintained roads and access tracks to project standards.
Completed civil earthworks associated with pipeline construction projects.
Undertook water transfer and storage civil works including turkey's nest construction.
Constructed equipment and laydown pad civil works.
Conducted greenfields site clearance in accordance with environmental guidelines.
Performed load and haul operations and managed stockpile creation and monitoring.
Assisted with NPI (Non-Process Infrastructure) construction activities.
Operated excavators for civil and mining earthworks.
Utilised GPS machine control (IT) for precision earthworks.
Operated loaders for general materials handling.
Assisted with pipe handling and minor earthworks activities.
Constructed turkey's nest water storage facilities.
Boxed out subgrade for car parks and access roads.
Loaded tipper trucks using a 24-tonne excavator and loader.
Backfilled trenches for services and infrastructure.
Operated water carts for dust suppression and site management.
Completed detailed earthworks for concrete slabs and footings.
Performed final trim earthworks for veranda pads and footpaths to ±5–10mm tolerance.
Trenched for services including power, water, and communications to grade.
Managed and coordinated up to 25 personnel including operators and plumbers.
Checked and signed off Job Hazard Analysis (JHA) sheets for crew compliance.
Installed stormwater drainage systems.
Lifted and placed concrete blocks using an excavator.
Conditioned and shaped subgrade materials.
Completed detailed earthworks around structures including battering.

skills.detail: Specialist in GPS-guided bulk and final trim earthworks, achieving precise tolerances for civil infrastructure, pads, and access roads across mining and civil projects.
Competent operator of excavators, dozers, loaders, rollers, skid steers, articulated dump trucks, forklifts, and telehandlers. Holds an HR Drivers Licence.
Experienced across road construction, pad development, pipeline civil works, turkey's nest construction, stockpile management, and greenfields clearing.
Holds a Traffic Control qualification applicable to construction and mining site environments.
Holds a rigging competency for lifting operations on civil and mining sites.

certifications.details: Competent operator of dozers for earthworks, bulk grading, and final trim applications.
Competent operator of motor graders for road construction and maintenance.
Competent operator of excavators for civil mining and construction earthworks.
Competent operator of rollers for compaction activities.
Competent operator of wheel loaders for materials handling and earthworks.
Rigging competency for lifting and load management operations.
Competent operator of skid steer loaders for civil and mining applications.
Competent operator of articulated dump trucks for haul and earthworks activities.
High Risk Work Licence for forklift operation.
Competent operator of telehandlers for materials handling and elevated placement.
Traffic control qualification for management of traffic in construction and mining environments.
Western Australian Heavy Rigid (HR) class motor vehicle drivers licence.
Approved site induction for Rio Tinto operations.
Approved site induction for Fortescue operations.
Approved site induction for BHP operations.
Approved site induction for Roy Hill operations.

referees: Professional references available upon request. Please contact ACM Resources to facilitate introduction.
